name: Grand Theft Auto IV: The Complete Edition
post_apply_message:
GTA IV: The Complete Edition (Steam appid 12210) + FusionFix v5.0.1 (ThirteenAG) — the essential all-in-one fix. It repairs the PC port's aspect-ratio/FOV handling (the bit that matters for 16:10), adds a real framerate-cap toggle (the port ties physics to FPS), kills the map z-fighting/flicker, restores shadows/reflections/DOF, and brings back the removed radio tracks + definitive-edition visuals.

Apply does: (1) installs GE-Proton 10.34 into compatibilitytools.d and FORCES it for appid 12210 (GE bundles the d3dx9 DirectX runtime FusionFix needs, so NO protontricks/d3dx9_43 step is required); (2) drops FusionFix into the game's GTAIV subfolder ({game_dir}/GTAIV, next to GTAIV.exe) — dinput8.dll (ASI loader) + d3d9.dll + plugins/*.asi/.ini + the update/ shader+data overlay (originals backed up as .gfm-bak); (3) sets the launch option WINEDLLOVERRIDES="dinput8=n,b" %command% so Wine loads FusionFix's loader. Stage GE first with 'gfm stage-runner'.

CONTROLLER: native Xbox 360 support — Steam Input covers it, no fix needed.

ONE THING TO VERIFY ON THE DECK (couldn't test here — GTA IV isn't synced to the dev box): the DLL override. dinput8=n,b is the loader FusionFix uses; its bundled d3d9.dll is left inert so Proton's DXVK keeps handling D3D9. If FusionFix's in-game menu doesn't appear or graphics options are missing, the fallback is to also override d3d9 — but try dinput8-only first.

Check it worked: launch, and FusionFix's version string / new graphics options should show in the in-game menu.
notes: Built 2026-07-13. Tony confirmed he owns the Steam Complete Edition (appid 12210). FusionFix (github ThirteenAG/GTAIV.EFLC.FusionFix) is THE essential GTA IV fix — pinned to v5.0.1 (resolved from releases/latest 2026-07-13; assets rebuilt 2026-05-12), zip sha256 3c202398…, 197MB, fetched as a remote_payload (too big + copyrighted-adjacent for git) and extracted to payload/fusionfix. Zip layout: dinput8.dll (5.4MB ASI loader) + d3d9.dll (1.3MB) + plugins/GTAIV.EFLC.FusionFix.asi (16MB) + .ini + update/ (frontend_menus.xml, frontend_pc.dat, visualsettings.dat, common/shaders/**). Install per FusionFix readme = extract to the folder where GTAIV.exe is; for the Complete Edition that is the GTAIV/ SUBFOLDER (steamapps/common/Grand Theft Auto IV/GTAIV/), NOT the install root — confirmed 2026-07-13 (2026 Steam guide 3301059886), so copy target = {game_dir}/GTAIV and detect marker = GTAIV/GTAIV.exe. Recipe forces GE-Proton10-34 via proton_version (works on Steam appids, writes CompatToolMapping) BECAUSE GE bundles d3dx9_43 that FusionFix needs — sidesteps the 'protontricks 12210 d3dx9_43' step the Gillian guide lists for stock Proton. Override = dinput8=n,b (standard ThirteenAG loader; d3d9.dll left inert so DXVK handles D3D9 on Proton — the .asi carries the features, not the d3d9 proxy). UNVERIFIED on Tony's Deck: whether d3d9 also needs overriding (fallback only; dinput8-only is the expected working config). FusionFix only supports the Complete Edition (1.0.8.0 = 'compromised, unsupported'). Controller native. Refs: FusionFix repo, gillian-guide.github.io/essential-modding/fusionfix, protondb app/12210, steamcommunity guide 3301059886.
